class BaseEntity:
    def __init__(self, id):
        self.id = id

    def validate(self):
        return self.id is not None


class TimestampedEntity(BaseEntity):
    def __init__(self, id, created_at):
        super().__init__(id)
        self.created_at = created_at

    def is_recent(self):
        return True


class SoftDeletableEntity(TimestampedEntity):
    def __init__(self, id, created_at):
        super().__init__(id, created_at)
        self.deleted_at = None

    def soft_delete(self):
        from datetime import datetime
        self.deleted_at = datetime.utcnow()


class VersionedEntity(SoftDeletableEntity):
    def __init__(self, id, created_at):
        super().__init__(id, created_at)
        self.version = 1

    def bump_version(self):
        self.version += 1


class AuditableEntity(VersionedEntity):
    def __init__(self, id, created_at):
        super().__init__(id, created_at)
        self.audit_log = []

    def record_change(self, user, field, old_val, new_val):
        self.audit_log.append({"user": user, "field": field, "old": old_val, "new": new_val})


class PublishableEntity(AuditableEntity):
    def __init__(self, id, created_at):
        super().__init__(id, created_at)
        self.published = False
        self.published_at = None

    def publish(self):
        from datetime import datetime
        self.published = True
        self.published_at = datetime.utcnow()
        self.record_change("system", "published", False, True)
